abilities.description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground directly in front of him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
params: Move Speed Slow Increase per Stack: 12%/13%/14%/15%
abilities.name: Shadowraze (Near)

abilities.description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a short distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
params: Move Speed Slow Increase per Stack: 12%/13%/14%/15%
abilities.name: Shadowraze (Medium)

abilities.description: Shadow Fiend razes the ground a longer distance away from him, dealing damage to enemy units in the area. Adds a stacking damage amplifier on the target that causes the enemy to take bonus Shadowraze damage per stack.
params: Move Speed Slow Increase per Stack: 12%/13%/14%/15%
abilities.name: Shadowraze (Far)

abilities.description: Shadow Fiend steals the soul from units he kills, gaining bonus damage. On death, he releases 30% of them from bondage.
params: Passive ComponentMax Stacks: 11/14/17/20 ([picture:aghanim's_scepter_symbol] 25)Stack Gain per Kill: 1 ([picture:aghanim's_shard_symbol] 2)Attack Damage Bonus per Stack: 1/2/3/4 ([picture:talent_tree_symbol] 4/5/6/7)Stacks Lost on Death: 30%
abilities.name: Necromastery
abilities.story: Harvested souls swirl in and out of the Abysm, empowering the Shadow Fiend to increase the size of his collection.

abilities.description: Shadow Fiend's presence reduces the armor of nearby enemies. Every enemy hero killed nearby further improves armor reduction by 2 for 20s.
abilities.name: Presence of the Dark Lord
abilities.story: Even being near Nevermore eats away at one's soul.

abilities.description: Shadow Fiend gathers his captured souls to release them as lines of demonic energy. Units near Shadow Fiend when the souls are released can be damaged by several lines of energy. Any unit damaged by Requiem of Souls will be feared and have its movement speed and magic resistance reduced for 0.7 seconds for each line hit up to a maximum of 2.15. Lines of energy are created for every soul captured through Necromastery. Requiem of Souls is automatically cast whenever Shadow Fiend dies, regardless of its cooldown.
abilities.name: Requiem of Souls
abilities.story: The captured souls of those past slain are released to ravage their former allies.

description: Unleashes the souls of fallen enemies for damage. Capturing Souls from every kill he makes, Shadow Fiend is always gathering his power. Armor fails within the Presence of the Dark Lord, leaving foes no choice but to scramble. Every assault, each carefully aimed Shadowraze kills an enemy, brings him closer to his acme of potency. The Shadow Fiend pauses to charge his demonic energies, then, with a flourish of his lightless wings, unleashes his gathered souls in all directions to obliterate enemies in a howling Requiem of Souls.  Carry Nuker  Demon, Flying, Red Legs ( 0 )
trivia: Shadow Fiend's alternate/fun name in DotA was "YaphetS", a tribute to a professional DotA player who skillfully used Nevermore.
